zh.Strensham, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆
zh.Kingston Russell, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素
英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Russell於大約1180年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Odo de Russell32歲，母親Alica Bardolf26歲。他於從1201年1月8日到1202年1月7日與Lady Rohese de Bardolf在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1224年在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年46歲。

zh-hans.Strensham, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆
zh-hans.Kingston Russell, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素
英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Russell于大约1180年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Odo de Russell32岁，母亲Alica Bardolf26岁。他于从1201年1月8日到1202年1月7日与Lady Rohese de Bardolf在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1224年在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Russell was born about 1180, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Odo de Russell, was 32 and his mother, Alica Bardolf, was 26. He married Lady Rohese de Bardolf from 8 January 1201 to 7 January 1202, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1224, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Russell est né environ 1180, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Odo de Russell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alica Bardolf, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Rohese de Bardolf du 8 janvier 1201 au 7 janvier 1202, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1224, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Russell um 1180 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Odo de Russell 32 und seine Mutter Alica Bardolf 26. Er hat von 8. Januar 1201 bis 7. Januar 1202 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England Lady Rohese de Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1224 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Russell è nato il circa 1180 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Odo de Russell, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alica Bardolf, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Rohese de Bardolf da 8 gennaio 1201 a 7 gennaio 1202, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1224, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Russellが約1180年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Odo de Russellは32歳，母Alica Bardolfは26歳であった。から1201年1月8日まで1202年1月7日にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルでLady Rohese de Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1224年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Russell(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Odo de Russell(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alica Bardolf(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1201년 1월 8일부터 1202년 1월 7일까지 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 Lady Rohese de Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1224년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1201: de 8 de janeiro de 1201 a 7 de janeiro de 1202
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Russell nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odo de Russell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alica Bardolf, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Rohese de Bardolf de 8 de janeiro de 1201 a 7 de janeiro de 1202, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1224, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Russell родился около 1180 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Odo de Russell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alica Bardolf, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Rohese de Bardolf с 8 января 1201 по 7 января 1202 в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1224 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Lady Rohese de Bardolf desde 8 de enero de 1201 hasta 7 de enero de 1202, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1224, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
